_comment: Waypoint coordinates in the SLAM map frame (metres).
_calibration_protocol: 1. Generate SLAM map: ros2 launch robot_bringup slam.launch.py
2. Drive robot through campus via teleop, save map:
3. Load map in RViz: ros2 launch nav2_bringup bringup_launch.py map:=~/maps/iscshj_campus.yaml
4. Drive robot to each location, then record pose:
5. Copy position.x, position.y, orientation.z, orientation.w into this file.
6. Test: ros2 topic pub /nav_goal std_msgs/String '{data: "admin office"}' --once
